C1A_Rear_Side_Radar_Left_4.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference C1A_Rear_Side_Radar_Left_4.0_20170811T104937.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 73D
Receive ID 73E
Functional Addr 63
Functional Name SOW Left
